features.name: ClickHouse Connector Tests
features.description: Validates ClickHouse JDBC type mapping (UUID, signed/unsigned integers, floats, arrays, tuples, maps, dates, nested, geo) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live ClickHouse connection.

features.name: MariaDB Connector Tests
features.description: Validates MariaDB JDBC type mapping (dates, binary, bit, character, float, integer, spatial) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live MariaDB connection.

features.name: SQL Server (MSSQL) Connector Tests
features.description: Validates MSSQL JDBC type mapping (dates, XML, binary, numeric, float, money, geography, geometry) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live SQL Server connection.

features.name: MySQL Connector Tests
features.description: Validates MySQL JDBC type mapping (dates, binary, bit, character, float, JSON, integer, spatial) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live MySQL connection.

features.name: Oracle Connector Tests
features.description: Validates Oracle JDBC type mapping (XML, character, dates, JSON, URI, Varray, numeric, LOB) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live Oracle connection.

features.name: PostgreSQL Connector Tests — Type Mapping & Pattern Operators
features.description: Validates PostgreSQL JDBC type mapping for advanced types (array, bit strings, composite, JSONB, UUID, XML, numeric precision, serial sequences) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite.

features.name: Snowflake Connector Tests
features.description: Validates Snowflake JDBC type mapping (binary, dates, geo, numeric, semi-structured JSON/VARIANT) and the full parameterized-pattern operator suite against a live Snowflake connection.

features.name: Parameterized Query Input Types
features.description: Tests end-to-end query execution with typed input parameters (int, double, bool, datetime, string choices, string patterns) and realistic relational fixtures (Orders, Products) across MSSQL and PostgreSQL.

features.name: Query Result Caching
features.description: Tests the platform's table-level and scalar caching layer, connection-scoped caching, cache invalidation, and wide-table cache behavior — all backed by PostgreSQL fixtures.

features.name: Result-Set Shape Validation
features.description: Tests that the connector correctly returns result sets of varying shapes — normal, wide-column, long-row, empty, and simple — ensuring column schemas are preserved even on empty results.

features.name: Query Performance Benchmarks
features.description: Measures raw throughput of the PostgreSQL JDBC connector under load, providing a performance baseline for regression detection.

features.name: Geo-Spatial Type Support (Cross-DB)
features.description: Cross-provider view of geo and spatial type handling: ClickHouse Geo, MariaDB/MySQL Spatial, MSSQL Geography+Geometry, and Snowflake Geo — verifying that each connector correctly surfaces these types.

features.name: Package Smoke Test
features.description: A single query against the System:Datagrok connection that verifies the DBTests package itself loads and can execute a query, serving as a pre-flight health check.

features.name: Test Infrastructure Utilities
features.description: Core TypeScript helpers used by all DB test suites: expectTable for tabular result assertion, info for package metadata, and changelog entries tracking test-suite maintenance.

features.name: Package Documentation
features.description: The DBTests package-level README (describing purpose and usage) and the third-party credits file.

features.name: Internal Platform Test Guides
features.description: A collection of internal QA guide pages covering platform-wide test scenarios (dialogs, export, sorting, UI, connectors, etc.) that are bundled with DBTests as a reference for internal testers.
